headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 10, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals suffered a 5-2 loss to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing an earned run.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, with Justin Verlander being transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers due to left hip inflammation. Other notable injuries include Kerry Carpenter (left AC Joint Sprain) and Logan Webb (right knee bursitis).

The San Francisco Giants made a key trade addition, acquiring LHP Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for C Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall to Marlins in 5-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dropped a 5-2 decision to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing an earned run.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics in Thrilling Match**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 2-1 victory over the Athletics, with Gunnar Henderson leading the team's offense with 2 hits and 1 RBI. Chris Bassitt earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 6 strong innings with 6 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Red Sox 4-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Bryan Baker earned the save in the win.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Phillies in Dominant 6-0 Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a convincing 6-0 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Cristopher Sánchez pitching 7.0 innings of shutout baseball, striking out 7 and allowing 6 hits. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, including 2 home runs, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Verlander Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Justin Verlander has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers due to left hip inflammation.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Addition**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants acquired LHP Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for C Patrick Bailey on May 9, 2026. Wilkinson joins the Giants in a trade that brings new depth to the team's pitching staff.
